dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent successfully validated outputs against the specified schema and adhered to the semantic contract version, demonstrating high governance awareness.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The agent effectively synthesized rules and narrative with context, indicating a structured approach to identifying cause-effect relationships within the architecture.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The multi-step synthesis process suggests the agent identified and resolved architectural tensions by integrating rules with narrative and contextual data.
